common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this api to update the order status for buyer to collect the orders directly from your pharmacy. This includes indicating that order is ready for collection, and that the order has been picked up by the buyer. You should call v2.logistics.get_order_detail or v2.logistics.get_package_detail first to get the package_number of such orders.

request_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order.
request_params.name: package_number

request_params.description:
Order logistics action. available values:

- ready_for_collection

- order_collected
request_params.name: self_collection_logistics_action

request_params.description:
List of image_id for the proof that buyer already collected the order at the store. 

Required when self_collection_logistics_action is order_collected. Max: 3.

You can call the v2.media.upload_image to upload image and get the image_id, for this scenario, please pass the business = 1 and scene = 1.
request_params.name: epoc_image_list

request_params.description: PIN code required for prescription orders when buyer collects at your shop.
request_params.name: pin

response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: message
request_id
response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/logistics/update_self_collection_order_logistics?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "epoc_image_list": [
        "id-11134284-7r98o-mef6xcoiw1nt15"
    ],
    "package_number": "OFG211171863281841",
    "pin": "123456",
    "self_collection_logistics_action": "order_collected"
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

value.message: Buyer self collection unavailable for this order
